target.title: fix: add self-knowledge docs rule to system prompt
target.body:
## Summary

- Adds the self-knowledge docs-authority rule to the generated Documentation section in `src/agents/system-prompt.ts`.
- Covers both local-docs and public-docs prompt rendering in `src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`.
- Updates `docs/concepts/system-prompt.md` so the public docs match the generated prompt behavior.

Fixes openclaw/openclaw#90713.
Addresses the review direction from openclaw/openclaw#90719.

## Verification

- `pnpm docs:list`
- `pnpm test src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/system-prompt.ts src/agents/system-prompt.test.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/system-prompt.md`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm exec tsx -e "import { buildAgentSystemPrompt } from './src/agents/system-prompt.ts'; const prompt = buildAgentSystemPrompt({ workspaceDir: '/tmp/openclaw', docsPath: '/tmp/openclaw/docs', sourcePath: '/tmp/openclaw' }); const lines = prompt.split('\n').filter((line) => line.includes('Self-knowledge rule') || line.includes('Do not infer from sparse context')); console.log(lines.join('\n'));"`.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: The generated OpenClaw system prompt now instructs agents to read relevant docs before answering self-knowledge questions about OpenClaw mechanisms, capabilities, configuration, or behavior, and not to infer from sparse context, workspace files, or training data.

Real environment tested: Local OpenClaw checkout on macOS, branch `sutrah/self-knowledge-docs-prompt`, commit `2be3be4c75`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm exec tsx -e "import { buildAgentSystemPrompt } from './src/agents/system-prompt.ts'; const prompt = buildAgentSystemPrompt({ workspaceDir: '/tmp/openclaw', docsPath: '/tmp/openclaw/docs', sourcePath: '/tmp/openclaw' }); const lines = prompt.split('\n').filter((line) => line.includes('Self-knowledge rule') || line.includes('Do not infer from sparse context')); console.log(lines.join('\n'));"`.

Evidence after fix:

```text
Self-knowledge rule: for questions about OpenClaw mechanisms, capabilities, configuration, or behavior, search/read the relevant docs above before answering.
Do not infer from sparse context, workspace files, or training data; if docs do not cover it, say so explicitly and then inspect source if needed.
```

Observed result after fix: The rendered Documentation section includes the new self-knowledge rule and no-inference guard.

What was not tested: I did not run a full end-to-end live agent conversation; the focused proof renders the same generated prompt surface used by agent runs.
target.author: sutrahsing
